item.title: Response to the attack on Jewish Londoners in Golders Green
item.description: My message to our Jewish community in Leyton and Wanstead following the horrific attack on Jewish Londoners in Golders Green.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Marking the Month of the Military Child
item.description: I was proud to host a reception in Parliament marking the Month of the Military Child, bringing together the Royal British Legion, Never Such Innocence, parliamentarians, and young people from Armed Forces families.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: My London Marathon 2026 run for Samaritans
item.description: A big thank you to everyone who supported my London Marathon run last weekend! Finished in 03:26 and even got my medal from Dawn Butler MP. I ran for the Samaritans, to show support for our wonderful Waltham Forest branch.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Raising antisemitic attacks in Parliament
item.description: Over recent days, London’s Jewish communities have been targeted by a wave of antisemitic attacks. We must stand together against this insidious racist violence.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Statement: Death on High Road Leyton
item.description: Last night, a man was stabbed on Leyton High Road and was pronounced dead at the scene. Four suspects have been arrested and the police assess no wider threat to the public. Road closures remain in place on High Road Leyton between Dunedin Road to Warren Road while investigations continue.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Question to the PM: Stephen Lawrence Day
item.description: Today marks the anniversary of the racist murder of Stephen Lawrence, my friend’s brother.We must tell a positive story of Englishness grounded in the England we are, not the England the far right wants us to be.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Celebrating Wanstead Repair Café
item.description: I recently attended a parliamentary reception celebrating Repair Cafés across the UK and it was fantastic to see our own Wanstead Repair Café represented among the community groups!
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Vaisakhi celebration at No.10
item.description: This week I attended the Vaisakhi celebration at No.10. The event recognised the tremendous contribution Sikh communities make across the UK. Awesome to meet so many incredible people, including fellow service personnel!
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Event: L&Q resident engagement meeting
item.description: Are you an L&Q resident? Do you want to share your feedback or concerns with L&Q? I am hosting an engagement meeting with L&Q for constituents next week at Leyton Orient, details below
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Passover Seder meal at the East London and Essex Liberal Synagogue
item.description: It was a pleasure to join members of the local Jewish community for a Passover Seder meal at the East London and Essex Liberal Synagogue last week. Sharing a meal with Rabbis Richard Jacobi and David Hulbert was a real privilege. I hope everyone who celebrated enjoyed a joyful Passover!
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Visit to the Waltham Forest Migrants Centre
item.description: Great to join Deputy Mayor Debbie Weekes‑Bernard and Cllr Grace Williams at Waltham Forest Migrants Centre last month. The centre provides a vital immigration drop‑in service, helping residents connect with government services and access the support they need to settle, thrive, and feel welcomed in our community.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Survey: Royal Mail’s postal delivery issues
item.description: I know Royal Mail’s postal delivery issues have been affecting residents in Wanstead Village and across the constituency – so I’ll be working with local councillors to improve this service!
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Rent to Own Policy Article with Cllr Grace Williams
item.description: The housing crisis blights the lives of so many in Leyton and Wanstead. But building more affordable homes is only part of the solution. We also need action to rebuild access to ownership for first-time buyers.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Running the London Marathon for Samaritans!
item.description: Inspired by the incredible work of the Waltham Forest branch on Lea Bridge Road - I’m running the London Marathon for Samaritans! This branch is hosted by Waltham Forest Council - so it is truly a service at the heart of our community.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: SEND coffee morning
item.description: Thank you to everyone who came along to my SEND coffee morning last weekend! It was a valuable conversation with parents and carers about the Government’s new SEND proposals, what’s working, what isn’t, and what needs to change for families locally.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Monthly Roundup: March 2026
item.description: From International Women’s Day events to roundtables for SEND parents and teachers, it was a busy March across the constituency and beyond. Now that April is here, I wanted to share a snapshot of what I’ve been up to over the past month
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Meal with Syrian refugees
item.description: We can see the problems that need to be fixed in our asylum system. But those who dehumanise and misrepresent refugees undermine progress and only seek to sow division for their own political benefit.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Drop-in at Nightingale Primary on the impact of smartphones and social media on children.
item.description: A really valuable discussion at Nightingale Primary this week on the impact of smartphones and social media on children.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Eid in Leyton and Wanstead
item.description: Over the Eid period I had the pleasure of visiting mosques across the constituency to join local communities in their celebrations.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP

item.title: Art Social coffee morning with Ideas Space
item.description: Last month I joined the brilliant team at Idea Space for one of their Art Social coffee mornings at Cann Hall and Harrow Green Baptist Church in Leytonstone.
item.dc:creator: Calvin Bailey MBE MP
